subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath believed in God, the Lord of Lords. Verily, he that hath attained unto the lights of this Day is numbered among the people [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن آمن بالله رب الارباب ان الذی فاز بانوار هذا الیوم انه من اهل
subcodes.subjects: @belief and denial, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
